# `api.commodities.get`

> `GET /commodity/{id}` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.commodities.get(commodity_id: str) -> Commodity
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab commodities get <commodity_id>
```

GET /commodity/{id}

## Response

Returns `Commodity`.

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `id` | `Optional[str]` | no | Commodity ID |
| `description` | `Optional[str]` | no | Commodity description |
| `freightClass` | `Optional[str]` | no | Freight class |
| `nmfcCode` | `Optional[str]` | no | NMFC code |
| `weightMin` | `Optional[float]` | no | Minimum weight |
| `weightMax` | `Optional[float]` | no | Maximum weight |
